title: FollowMove Results
description:
FollowMove Results

FollowMove Results

The following list is a summary of results for the FollowMove object.  The details for each result are explained in the Description field.

Result	Description

EndStatus Result	Returns end status for a force guide sequence or force guide object.

Time Result	Returns execution time for a force guide sequence or force guide object.

EndForces Result	Returns force and torque at end of a force guide object or force guide sequence.

EndPos Result	Returns position at end of a force guide object.

AvgForces Result	Returns average values of force and torque during execution of a force guide object.

PeakForces Result	Returns the peak values of force and torque during execution of a force guide object or force guide sequence.

PosCondOK Result	It is whether to satisfy the end conditions related to position.

IOCondOK Result	It is whether to satisfy the end conditions related to I/O.
